behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path, the createMemo values block, the KV key 'theme', and the fallback chain — all test specifics are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes expected behavior (check KV, validate, fallback) without prescribing exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check the returned theme value via resolveTheme mock; alternative implementations (ternary, if/else, nullish chaining) all pass as long as behavior matches.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract the memo body and execute it in Node.js with mocked store/kv, verifying actual return values.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_kv_fallback_when_active_missing requires returning 'T:dracula' when active is missing — a stub returning opencode default fails.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover KV fallback, active-theme priority, invalid-KV fallback to opencode, and non-string KV values — matching all three expected behaviors.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived, Repo CI/CD).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code behavior fix, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Naming the file and createMemo block is appropriate scoping, not line-level leakage; the fix logic is not given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
